scenarios.name: Identical globs in different specs
scenarios.evidence: JSON output returned status 'findings' with contradictory_globs array containing 1 entry showing both globs ('src/shared/**') and originating spec files (api.spec.yml, ui.spec.yml) with overlapping ownership description.

scenarios.name: Structural overlap (superset/subset)
scenarios.evidence: JSON output detected contradictory_globs between 'src/api/**' (narrow) and 'src/**' (wide) with overlapping ownership description. Structural analysis works even for subset patterns.

scenarios.name: Human-readable output
scenarios.evidence: Output contains 'Contradictory ownership globs:' section header, shows glob patterns with module names and spec paths, and includes overlapping ownership description.

scenarios.name: Clean project (no contradictions)
scenarios.evidence: JSON output returned status 'ok', no contradictory_globs field present (skip_serializing_if empty). Exit code 0.

scenarios.name: Existing adversarial fixture
scenarios.evidence: Existing fixture correctly detected 1 contradictory glob pair between modules 'api' and 'core' for pattern 'src/shared/**/*' with overlapping ownership description.
